title: Implement Wave 34 assignment-aware provider profile scorecard contract
description: Extend the provider profile API so manager requests can optionally include queue_item_id and receive additive assignment-fit scorecard metadata without breaking the baseline provider profile contract.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/providers/{id}?queue_item_id=... returns additive assignment_fit metadata for manager role
Requests without queue context preserve the current provider profile contract
Guardrails cover invalid token, forbidden role, unknown provider, and unknown queue item
